title: Automated Philippine Payroll
description: Process accurate payroll with automatic computation of SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, and BIR withholding tax per TRAIN Law.

title: SSS Contribution Management
description: Auto-compute SSS contributions using the 2024 contribution table (R.A. 11199). Generate R3 reports and e-filing ready files.

title: PhilHealth Integration
description: Automatic 5% premium computation per Circular 2023-0009. Generate RF-1 reports and MDR submissions.

title: Pag-IBIG Fund Management
description: Compute Pag-IBIG contributions and MPF. Handle Pag-IBIG loan deductions and generate MCRF reports.

title: BIR TRAIN Law Compliance
description: TRAIN Law withholding tax computation, 2316 generation, alphalist submission, and annual tax filing support.

title: Time & Attendance Tracking
description: Biometric integration, manual time entries, flexi-time support, and real-time attendance monitoring.

title: Overtime & Holiday Pay
description: Auto-calculate OT pay per PH Labor Code rates. Handles regular holidays, special non-working days, and rest day work.

title: Leave Management
description: SL, VL, SIL, maternity, paternity, solo parent, and VAWC leave tracking per Labor Code and special laws.

title: Employee Information System
description: Centralized 201 file management, employment history, document storage, and org chart visualization.

title: Recruitment & Onboarding
description: Job posting, applicant tracking, interview scheduling, and digital onboarding with e-signature support.

title: Performance Management
description: KPI setting, 360-degree feedback, performance review cycles, and merit increase recommendations.

title: Benefits Administration
description: HMO enrollment, life insurance, rice allowance, transportation, and 13th month pay automation.

title: Digital Payslips
description: Paperless payslip distribution via employee portal and email. Secure download with password protection.

title: Salary Loans & Advances
description: Manage SSS, Pag-IBIG, and company loans. Auto-deduct installments from payroll with amortization schedule.

title: HR Analytics & Reports
description: Headcount, turnover, payroll cost, attendance analytics. Export to Excel/PDF. Government-ready reports.

title: Mobile Employee Portal
description: iOS and Android app for leave filing, payslip viewing, attendance logging, and company announcements.

title: Multi-Company Support
description: Manage multiple legal entities under one account. Consolidated reports with per-company data isolation.

title: Approval Workflows
description: Configurable multi-level approval workflows for leave, overtime, expenses, and document requests.

title: Audit Trails
description: Complete audit log of all system actions. Role-based access control with data privacy compliance (RA 10173).

title: Accounting Integrations
description: Sync with QuickBooks, Xero, and local accounting software. Journal entry export for payroll transactions.

title: REST API & Webhooks
description: Open API for custom integrations. Webhooks for real-time event notifications to third-party systems.
